title: Kafka Source Plugin
description: An ansible-rulebook event source plugin for receiving events via a kafka topic.

port.description: The port where the kafka server is listening
port.title: Port

host.description: The host where the kafka topic is hosted
host.title: Host

cafile.description: Certificate authority file path containing certificates used to sign kafka broker certificates
cafile.title: Certificate Authority File

certfile.description: The optional client certificate file path containing the client certificate, as well as CA certificates needed to establish the certificate's authenticity
certfile.title: Certificate File

keyfile.description: The optional client key file path containing the client private key
keyfile.title: Key File

password.description: The optional password to be used when loading the certificate chain
password.title: Password

verify_mode.description: Whether to try to verify other peers' certificates and how to behave if verification fails.
verify_mode.title: Verify Mode

offset.description: Where to start reading messages from
offset.title: Offset

security_protocol.description: Protocol used to communicate with brokers.
security_protocol.title: Security Protocol

sasl_mechanism.description: Authentication mechanism when security_protocol is configured.
sasl_mechanism.title: SASL Mechanism

message_format.title: Message Format
message_format.description: The message serialization format. When set to 'json', messages are decoded as JSON (with fallback to raw string). When set to 'avro', messages are deserialized using Apache Avro.

schema_registry_url.title: Schema Registry URL
schema_registry_url.description: URL of the Confluent Schema Registry for Avro schema lookup. Required when using 'avro' format with Schema Registry. Requires the 'confluent-kafka[schemaregistry]' package.

schema_registry_basic_auth.title: Schema Registry Basic Auth
schema_registry_basic_auth.description: Basic authentication credentials for Schema Registry. Format is 'username:password'.

schema_registry_bearer_token.title: Schema Registry Bearer Token
schema_registry_bearer_token.description: Bearer token for Schema Registry authentication. Used for OAuth/OIDC authentication with Confluent Cloud or enterprise SSO. Mutually exclusive with schema_registry_basic_auth.

avro_schema_file.title: Avro Schema File
avro_schema_file.description: Path to a local Avro schema file (.avsc) for message deserialization. Used when Schema Registry is not available.

schema_registry_oauth_client_id.title: Schema Registry OAuth Client ID
schema_registry_oauth_client_id.description: OAuth client ID for Schema Registry authentication using client credentials grant. Requires confluent-kafka version 2.9.0 or later.

schema_registry_oauth_client_secret.title: Schema Registry OAuth Client Secret
schema_registry_oauth_client_secret.description: OAuth client secret for Schema Registry authentication.

schema_registry_oauth_token_url.title: Schema Registry OAuth Token URL
schema_registry_oauth_token_url.description: OAuth token endpoint URL for obtaining access tokens. Example: https://login.confluent.io/oauth/token

schema_registry_oauth_scope.title: Schema Registry OAuth Scope
schema_registry_oauth_scope.description: OAuth scope for the access token request. Common values include 'schema:read' or space-separated list of scopes.

schema_registry_logical_cluster.title: Schema Registry Logical Cluster
schema_registry_logical_cluster.description: Confluent Cloud logical cluster ID for Schema Registry. Format: lsrc-xxxxx. Required for Confluent Cloud OAuth authentication.

schema_registry_identity_pool_id.title: Schema Registry Identity Pool ID
schema_registry_identity_pool_id.description: Confluent Cloud identity pool ID for principal authorization. Format: pool-xxxxx. Required for Confluent Cloud OAuth authentication.

schema_registry_ssl.title: Schema Registry SSL
schema_registry_ssl.description: Whether to apply Kafka SSL settings (cafile, certfile, keyfile) to Schema Registry connections. Set to true when both Kafka and Schema Registry use the same certificates. Set to false when Schema Registry is on an internal network without SSL or uses different certificates.
